understanding.goal_understanding: Finish the current level (BP35) by navigating the character to the goal gem tile marked '+', avoiding any spikes so the run does not end, using at most 2 attempts and up to 50 turns per attempt; then continue completing subsequent levels until the game is won.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Each turn you choose a horizontal move (MOVE_LEFT/MOVE_RIGHT) or CLICK or UNDO. After any horizontal move, gravity automatically carries the character in the current gravity direction until it lands on a solid/support tile, reaches the goal '+', or hits a hazard; landing on spike tiles ('u' or 'v') immediately fails the attempt and restarts the level. CLICK targets a specific grid coordinate to interact with clickable tiles, mainly removing breakable blocks ('x') to open/alter fall paths; clicks do not consume moving-platform time when present. UNDO reverts the previous action to recover from a mistake. Planning uses the provided landing previews (left_landing/right_landing) and corridor_scan to pick safe landings and prioritize 'passage' columns that drop to a different y-level, while avoiding any move whose landing would be on spikes.
